sec1.title: 10.1 Work
sec1.content: This section discusses the core science topic: 10.1 Work. It explains the physical principles, chemical compositions, or biological structures of the subject matter. Observe the diagrams carefully and note down the SI units. For instance, the SI unit of force is the Newton ($N$), the unit of work is the Joule ($J$), and the unit of temperature is the Kelvin ($K$).
